anchored_threads.thread_name: The sthita-prajña / one whose insight is steady (verses 2.54-2.72)
anchored_threads.anchor_evidence: BG 2.7 is the operator-as-student moment that is the propaedeutic for sthita-prajña preparation — the chapter cannot reach the steady-mind teaching at all without this surrender. The engineering layer names the precise prerequisite: 'the peer-to-peer communication protocol cannot carry instructional signal at all. The operator must explicitly downgrade their own positional rank relative to the teacher for the teacher's actual instruction to become receivable.' This is the doorway to the chapter's later arc.

The verse explicitly anchors on the precondition for first-principles teaching: 'the principal responds the way Krishna responds — by reframing the substrate of the decision (what is invariant under sharding-strategy choice, what is implementation, what is the real unit of value the decision is supposed to serve).' This is the chapter's sāṅkhya / architectural-invariants thread, and 2.7 marks the verse where that teaching becomes receivable.

progression_issue.explanation: BG 2.7 is the pivotal verse — the chapter explicitly turns here from Arjuna's case to Krishna's reply. The engineering layer correctly anchors on this as the structural pivot, names the prerequisite for the teaching, and does not preempt the actual content of 2.11+ (it does not yet teach about ātman-as-invariant or karma-yoga; it only names the request-form that unlocks reception). Position-correct.

verdict_reason: BG 2.7 IS the pivotal moment of the chapter. Before this verse, Arjuna is presenting arguments. After this verse, he is a student. Krishna's teaching only begins after this surrender. The engineering layer correctly identifies this as the structural pivot, anchors on at least two of the chapter's threads (the propaedeutic for sthita-prajña, and the unlock for sāṅkhya-style reframing), preserves all hard edges (does not soften duty, does not flatten the discipleship-relation, does not turn the steady mind into an aspiration), and does not drift into territory the counter-anti-thesis disclaims (does not become detachment-from-users, does not float free of the larger order). The verse is correctly positioned as the doorway between Arjuna's case-closing (2.4-2.8) and Krishna's reply (2.11+). This is the chapter's center of gravity and the engineering layer treats it as such. PASS at high confidence.
